exception.message:
element click intercepted: Element is not clickable at point (1451, 829). Other element would receive the click:
...
(Session info: chrome=146.0.7680.154) Build info: version: '4.38.0', revision: '6b412e825c*' System info: os.name: 'Windows 10', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.3' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.remote.RemoteWebDriver Command: [ac8b0c12d27077f91f2080775fc8d7a8, clickElement {id=f.ADA9F39DDC8E479E7288C642FA15EFAC.d.284C097F8B66F6C5F3D3B5605D493A5D.e.242}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 146.0.7680.154, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 146.0.7680.154 (1e5cd4f5284..., userDataDir: /var/folders/sy/z10qqst9617...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:9225}, goog:processID: 17968, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: mac, proxy: Proxy(), setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Element: [[RemoteWebDriver: chrome on mac (ac8b0c12d27077f91f2080775fc8d7a8)] -> xpath: //button[text()='Submit']] Session ID: ac8b0c12d27077f91f2080775fc8d7a8
